statement.markdown: Given an integer array, write a function to find the length of the longest increasing subsequence (LIS). If there are multiple subsequences with the same length, return the first one you encounter.
statement.inputFormat: The function takes a single argument, an integer array, with n elements. Each element is an integer between 1 and 10000.
statement.outputFormat: The function should return an integer representing the length of the longest increasing subsequence.
statement.notes: You can assume the input array will always contain at least one element.
